name: LEXICON PHARMACEUTICALS, INC.
summary: Overview We are a biopharmaceutical company with a mission of pioneering medicines that transform patients lives. We are devoting most of our resources to the research and development of our most advanced drug candidates and the commercialization of our approved drug, INPEFA (sotagliflozin): We are developing sotagliflozin, an orally-delivered small molecule drug candidate, as a treatment for hypertrophic cardiomyopathy, or HCM, and are conducting the SONATA-HCM pivotal Phase 3 clinical trial of...
